texto: I was so lucky to have parents who supported me, 100%, with whatever I was doing, both financially and emotionally. Having that they made my life so much easier. Instead of becoming a bartender and trying to survive while trying to pursue your dreams, I didn't have to worry about that aspect. I could just pursue my dreams.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Cam Gigandet sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “I was so lucky to have parents who supported me, 100%, with whatever I was doing, both financiall…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a motivacao, vida, parents, útil em momentos de termino e parents.
